_comment: Hand-maintained corrections. Overrides ALWAYS win and survive every re-scrape. Keys are grotto names (case-insensitive, whitespace-collapsed). Keys starting with '_' are ignored. Fields: exclude (bool, drop it), town, state, lat, lng (pin a town centroid), name, contact_url, note. See README 'How overrides work'.

_example_coordinate_fix.note: EXAMPLE ONLY (key starts with _ so it is ignored). To fix a mislocated grotto, copy this under its exact name: "Some Grotto": { "lat": 35.123, "lng": -86.456, "note": "why" }

Pittsburgh Grotto.note: Source misspells the town as 'McKeespot', which fails to geocode. Corrected to McKeesport, PA.

Israeli Caving Club.note: Foreign (Israel); outside the scope of a US nearest-to-me map.

Anthros Costa Rica Grotto.note: Foreign (Costa Rica); listed in the source but not a US location.

PAAMUL - Gruta de.note: Foreign (Mexico); source entry has no usable US town.
